target_page: Clientes nuevos y Operativos PARA COMITE

missing_relationship.description: This is the CRITICAL fix. Without this relationship, PREVIOUSMONTH/DATEADD on Calendario[Dia] cannot filter Operaciones BI, causing all MoM measures to return BLANK/zero.

root_cause.filter_conflict: Año/Mes slicers block PREVIOUSMONTH from accessing previous year data

relationship_fix.description: This is the CRITICAL fix. Without this relationship, PREVIOUSMONTH/DATEADD on Calendario[Dia] cannot filter Operaciones BI, causing all MoM measures to return BLANK/zero.

Calendario[MesAño].name: MesAño
Calendario[MesAño].description: Calculated column for month-year slicer. Allows filtering by month without blocking previous month data.

Clientes Operativos mes anterior.name: Clientes Operativos mes anterior
Clientes Operativos mes anterior.expression:
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT('Operaciones BI'[Nº Bind Inversiones]),
    DATEADD(Calendario[Dia], -1, MONTH),
    REMOVEFILTERS('Bind Inversiones'[fecha inicio])
)
Clientes Operativos mes anterior.description: REPLACE existing. Uses DATEADD instead of PREVIOUSMONTH for robustness with partial month selections.

dif mes anterior.name: dif mes anterior
dif mes anterior.expression:
VAR _current = [Clientes Operativos]
VAR _previous = [Clientes Operativos mes anterior]
RETURN
    IF(
        NOT ISBLANK(_previous) && NOT ISBLANK(_current),
        _current - _previous,
        BLANK()
    )
dif mes anterior.description: REPLACE existing. Returns BLANK instead of 0 when data is missing.

% cambio MoM Clientes Operativos.name: % cambio MoM Clientes Operativos
% cambio MoM Clientes Operativos.expression:
VAR _current = [Clientes Operativos]
VAR _previous = [Clientes Operativos mes anterior]
RETURN
    IF(
        NOT ISBLANK(_previous) && _previous <> 0,
        DIVIDE(_current - _previous, _previous),
        BLANK()
    )
% cambio MoM Clientes Operativos.description: NEW. Percentage change month-over-month for Clientes Operativos.

Clientes Nuevos mes anterior.name: Clientes Nuevos mes anterior
Clientes Nuevos mes anterior.expression:
CALCULATE(
    COUNT('Bind Inversiones'[Nº Bind Inv]),
    DATEADD(Calendario[Dia], -1, MONTH)
)
Clientes Nuevos mes anterior.description: NEW. Count of new clients from previous month.

dif Clientes Nuevos MoM.name: dif Clientes Nuevos MoM
dif Clientes Nuevos MoM.expression:
VAR _current = [Clientes Nuevos]
VAR _previous = [Clientes Nuevos mes anterior]
RETURN
    IF(
        NOT ISBLANK(_previous) && NOT ISBLANK(_current),
        _current - _previous,
        BLANK()
    )
dif Clientes Nuevos MoM.description: NEW. Month-over-month difference for Clientes Nuevos.
